question: For all of the 4 cylinder cars, which model has the most horsepower?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Cylinders  =  4 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.mode FROM car_names AS T1 JOIN cars_data AS T2 ON T1.make = T2.id WHERE T2.cyli = 4 ORDER BY T2.hors DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.mode FROM car_names AS T1 JOIN cars_data AS T2 ON T1.make = T2.id WHERE T2.cyli = 4 ORDER BY T2.hors DESC LIMIT 1;
